description: Multi-profile auth: a GitHub connector already has a Plain profile (GitHub) and an APIKey profile (GitHub IAM) migrated. Generating a third integration (GitHub MCP) with a COMPLICATED Passthrough auth method (interpolated, 4 mapped roles client_id/client_secret/tenant_id/access_token, plus base_url/scope other_connection fields) appends a third 'passthrough' profile to connection.yaml while preserving the existing plain + api_key profiles.
